title: Junior Business Development Manager at Gaurs Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Gaurs Group
jsonLd.description:
Gaurs Group has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Gaurs Group:
Gaurs Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gaurs Group!
